steps.title: Sum all five land areas from the table
steps.content: From the table: Monaco (2.0), Nauru (21), San Marino (61), Tuvalu (26), Vatican City (0.44) square kilometers. Adding them: $$2.0 + 21 + 61 + 26 + 0.44 = 110.44$$

steps.title: Calculate mean and round to the nearest square kilometer
steps.content: Mean is $$\frac{110.44}{5} = 22.088$$. Rounded to the nearest square kilometer: 22. B is correct.
